table_description: Daily product usage metrics per customer — API calls, active users, storage, reports.
use_cases: Correlate usage with churn risk (low usage → high churn probability)
Identify power users vs dormant accounts
Track product adoption trends over time
Build customer health scores combining usage signals
data_quality_notes: Not every day has a row — data is sampled 3-5 days per month per customer
Use AVG or SUM with GROUP BY to get monthly aggregates
active_users can exceed seats (minimum is 1, not 0)

table_columns.name: api_calls
table_columns.description: Number of API calls that day

table_columns.name: active_users
table_columns.description: Users who logged in that day
